heading: Appropriations
label: 4515 Appropriations
text: There are appropriated to the James Madison Memorial Trust Fund $20,000,000 to carry out the provisions of this chapter, $10,000,000 of which shall be available on , and to remain available until expended; and $10,000,000 of which shall be available on , and to remain available until expended.November 1, 1987November 1, 1988
notes: Codificationis a corrected version of .Pub. L. 99–591Pub. L. 99–500
